project_description: Auto-advance procurement kanban brand-slices on key user actions: (1) when all items of a brand have МОЗ assigned → distributing → searching_supplier; (2) when invoices.sent_at is set → searching_supplier → waiting_prices for brands present in that invoice; (3) when an invoice is procurement-completed → waiting_prices → prices_ready for brands fully covered by completed invoices. Wired into existing Server Actions (assignBrandGroup, sendInvoice, completeInvoiceProcurement) without a new Python endpoint. Manual drag-and-drop continues to work and overrides auto-advance.
